name: Spicy Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb chicken pieces (meaty breast halves, thighs or drumsticks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin from chicken.
2. Rinse the chicken and pat dry.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together bread crumbs, snipped parsley, crushed dried Italian seasoning, seasoned salt or salt, and ground red pepper.
4. Place four pieces of chicken in a plastic bag.
5. Place milk in a shallow bowl; set aside.
6. Add the chicken pieces one at a time to the bag; shake to coat.
7. Dip each piece in milk, then dip again in the bread crumb mixture, pressing lightly to coat well.
8. Spray a 13 by 9 by 2-inch baking dish with non-stick coating.
9. Arrange the chicken pieces, meaty sides up, in the dish.
10. Bake in a 375°F oven for 45 to 55 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink. Makes 4 servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 3 Lean Meat Exchanges + 1 Starch/Bread Exchange
Brought to you by Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
Source: Better Homes and Gardens Diabetic Cookbook
